parameters.query:
INSERT INTO customers (full_name, email, phone)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order.customer.full_name }}',
  '{{ $json.order.customer.email }}',
  '{{ $json.order.customer.phone }}'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO orders (
  order_code,
  customer_id,
  total_amount,
  status,
  payment_status,
  delivery_status
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validate Data').item.json.order.order_code }}',
  {{ $json.id }},
  {{ $('Validate Data').item.json.order.total_amount }},
  'confirmed',
  '{{ $('Validate Data').item.json.order.payment_status }}',
  'not_shipped'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO order_items (
  order_id,
  product_id,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  line_total
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.order_id }},
  id,
  {{ $json.quantity }},
  {{ $json.unit_price }},
  {{ $json.line_total }}
FROM products
WHERE product_code = '{{ $json.product_code }}'
RETURNING id;
